Content B only discusses Phase I dosing and provides no clinicaltrials.gov reference or NCT number at all, making it strictly worse for answering the specific NCT number requested. Neither set explicitly states 'NCT07128121' in the visible text, but A at least establishes clear phase information and links to clinicaltrials.gov as a source type, giving a better foundation for an agent to locate or infer the correct NCT number than B, which lacks any NCT reference entirely.
